title: ORIENTOOLS Garden Rake for Leaves Adjustable Lightweight Steel Handle Poly Shrub Leaf Rake (Adjustable Light Green Hand 22 Tines)
features: Adjustable Handle: The rake can adjust overall length from 107cm to 153cm by twisting the handle clockwise, and you just turn in the opposite direction to fix length.
Multifunctional: The rake is easy to go under bushes and between flowers or in a vegetable garden, and you would never have to lean over the yard again.

Lightweight and Compact: This leaf rake is very light and maneuverable around your garden and in between your car and curb where leaves tend to collect, and the 22 tines are solid and close enough that leaves don’t get stuck.
Long Reach: The long 153cm handle will save your back when you clean up your yard, and create the healthiest environment for your lawn, your grass and soil need to breathe and receive water.
Easy to Storage: When not in use, the handle can be abridged and you can hang it up to save space.
description: Product Description Previous page DURABLE AND STRONG TINES The 22 tines are solid and close enough that leaves don’t get stuck. GET IT NOW FOLDING DESIGN Easy to fold and store. GET IT NOW 360° ROTATE GRIP You can easily hang it on a hook and it won't easily fall off. GET IT NOW SNAP LOCK These rakes are connected by spring clip that are easy to remove and install. These joints also make them less likely to bend and break during use. GET IT NOW NEWLY UPGRADED SLEEVE External sleeve for increased load-bearing capacity. GET IT NOW ANTI-SLIP Design The non-slip grip and handle increase friction and feel better when in use. GET IT NOW Next page New Product Upgrades & Iterations Different materials from others The foldable handle is made of alloy steel, which is stronger and more durable than aluminum rods, making it less likely to bend and break during use. Stronger load-bearing capacity The new folding design is stronger and more durable than the traditional straight aluminum pole, easier and increasing the life of the product.
